description: You have a spreadsheet with two sheets: Products and Orders. Populate the price column in the Orders sheet by matching the product IDs with the corresponding prices in the Products sheet.

natural_language.prompt: You have a spreadsheet with two sheets: Products (with product IDs and prices) and Orders (with product IDs that need prices). Use VLOOKUP formulas in the Orders sheet to automatically populate the prices by looking up the product IDs in the Products sheet.
